translation_notes: Acts continues Luke's second volume and should preserve ordered narrative, Spirit agency, witness, prayer, communal life, and expansion from Jerusalem to nations.
Pneuma hagion should usually be holy Spirit, preserving Spirit agency rather than abstraction.
Martys/martyria should be witness/testimony, preserving public embodied witness.
Ekklesia should be assembly/community according to context, not automatically institutional church.
Metanoia should remain turning/realignment, and aphesis release/forgiveness according to context.
Sozo should remain saved/healed where rescue and embodied healing overlap.
Name language should preserve power/authority/invocation/resonance around the name of Jesus Messiah.
Keep Jewish temple, synagogue, prayer, festival, Scripture, and apostolic witness context intact; avoid replacement framing.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace source-audited restored text.
Verse-number alignment must remain intact in both restored and mystical companion files.
next_actions: Begin Acts 1-4: ascension, Spirit promise, Jerusalem witness, Matthias, Pentecost, Peter's speech, communal life, temple healing, Peter's Solomon Portico speech, arrest, council witness, boldness prayer, shared possessions.
